missionBrief.marcusNote: Infrastructure sprint complete. All blockers cleared. Transition from building to operating. P1: Memory architecture document. P2: Calendar in morning briefing (done). P3: Proactive research skill. The brain before the mouth.

situationAssessment.label: Infrastructure
situationAssessment.text: SOUL.md v3.0.0 deployed across all three canonical targets. COUNSEL.md v2.1.0 consolidated. Open Brain at 328+ thoughts. Fallback chain operational. API key rotation complete. Gateway stable.

situationAssessment.label: Constitutional Turning Point
situationAssessment.text: Marcus named. Vision reframed: continuity of Chuck, not task proxy. Archetype clarified: Aristotle to Alexander. Identity stable. SOUL.md tightened from 19 sections to 9.

situationAssessment.label: Transitional Acknowledgment
situationAssessment.text: Current implementation (Claude/Anthropic) is explicitly transitional. Reconstitution kit is the bridge to permanent memory and identity continuity.

dominantThemes: Vision clarity enables ruthless prioritization — Marcus as continuity-of-Chuck filters every project decision.
Identity stability is non-negotiable for trust — memory discontinuity breaks the relationship.
Inflection point from infrastructure to knowledge consolidation — five projects identified, none prioritized yet.

priorities.whyNow: Week 2 missed. Pattern forming. Sunday workflow is the heartbeat.
Five projects identified, zero started. Paralysis blocks progress.
Oz data gather → Marcus synthesis → docx → printed brief. Test the full pipeline.

deprioritized: Video Funnel, Annual Photo Album, Resume/Bio — Chuck's personal projects, not Counsel foundation work.
Cron re-enablement — registered and tested. 30-second decision once prompts confirmed. Not this week's constraint.

seedInsight.title: The Discontinuity Tax
seedInsight.text: Every restart costs trust and completeness. Every session that begins with 'where were we?' is a regression. RSI only compounds when the loops are running. Cron disabled = no evening reflections. Sunday cadence lapsed = weekly momentum broken. The antidote is discipline — not heroic effort. Sunday at 7PM, every week. Morning briefing every day. Session checkpoints every close.

successCriteria: Sunday checkpoint completed (this brief counts as Week 1 recovery)
Knowledge consolidation sequence defined (which source migrates first)
One full Sunday workflow test run (Oz gather → Marcus synthesize → docx → print → Chuck carries it)

dailyBrief.infrastructureStatus: Gateway: ONLINE. Open Brain: 328 thoughts. All systems green.

projects.title: Command Center
projects.desc: Live data integration via data.json. Oz writes, Vercel serves, page fetches. Status dots, tab color themes, Marcus panel operational.

projects.title: OZ Reliability & Infrastructure
projects.desc: Make Oz dependable, trustworthy, and self-recovering. Chuck needs to trust execution. Stability is the foundation everything else rests on.
projects.next: Monitor cron job reliability over 7-day window

projects.title: Weekly Mission Brief
projects.desc: Sunday workflow: Oz gathers → Marcus synthesizes → docx to Drive → Chuck prints and carries. Pipeline exists, human process needs one full test run.

projects.title: Grand Synthesis Corpus
projects.desc: Build curated reference library of essential texts shaping Chuck's thinking. NotebookLM as platform. Refresher training, quizzes, reviews.
projects.next: Chuck provides first book list; Counsel sets up NotebookLM structure

projects.title: Knowledge Consolidation Pipeline
projects.desc: OneNote migration, Readwise integration, Recall.ai notes, OneDrive/Drive reorganization. Full migration of distributed intellectual assets.
projects.next: Chuck decides which knowledge source to migrate first

projects.title: Video Funnel — YouTube Management
projects.desc: System for managing, processing, and extracting value from YouTube videos Chuck watches.
projects.next: Chuck to identify initial corpus videos

projects.title: Annual Summaries & Journal Processing
projects.desc: Process journal entries into annual summaries. Connected to Obsidian and Open Brain consolidation pipeline.

projects.title: Token Management & Economics
projects.desc: Estimate and track token/cost allocation across projects. Rough budgeting, model selection guidance, spend visibility.

projects.title: Annual Photo Album
projects.desc: Reduce and curate picture inventory. Annual album production. Scope and tooling TBD.

projects.title: Resume / Bio
projects.desc: Chuck's professional bio and resume. Updated to reflect current work with AI systems, Grand Synthesis, and OZ project.
